segments.text: We are worshipping Adi Shakti.
I think this is the most important puja because it's the power of Adishakti that has given
New Self-Realization that has given you the truth,
That's giving You The Power of Compassion and Love.
That is a power
that separated from Sadashiva
And this power wanted Herself
to create This complete Universe
Universes after universes
She was creative
And loving her, with Her love She did this great creation of the world also.
This is a specially selected planet which was very beautifully brought in to center
between The Sun and Moon for the creation ultimately by human beings.
This is her great work, with such love and affection.
And we have a very good hope that Her children will know the truth
– they'll get their ultimate knowledge about themselves
…and everything else as you read in the Bible
about how Adi Shakti came in the form of a snake and told human beings that you have
to know for knowledge, Adam & Eve.
And to Eve especially!
They accepted it – eat fruit from knowledge because they would remain just like animals
without knowing anything subtleties of life, little higher animals maybe that once they
ate the fruit and started feeding.
That there is something wrong with their clothes so they brought some leaves up a
tree to cover themselves.
So the first knowledge came was of chastity, because Shri Ganesha was established and His
influence brought forth this consciousness that we have to cover our bodies.
We are no more animals – only the animals…
Of course they're not standing so it's all right
are not aware of it.
With the knowledge
Of chastity
gradually human beings started growing
into beautiful nations
but there were so many things which we're still
to be known,
To Be Aware off It
You may be
aware
Off Many Things
But unless and until
you get your spiritual
awakening
Unless and until you get your self-knowledge, all other knowledge is absolutely nothing.
With this Self-Knowledge only
You become powerful
The real power
the Real Power
Is of Love & Compassion
Today when you see
The whole world is busy fighting and they are trying to protect people from wars,
creating great huge protecting instruments.
The whole world seems to be in a mad race of killing each other,
or destroying each other.
Of competition ambition leading
into fighting and then two greater wars
they are fighting for
piece-of land so ignorant
they are, can you carry even a pinch of this land with You?
When you die – when we're born
We come with closed streets.
And then if I go with open hands
what do take it all right
will be not like to take anything
but do enjoy whatever you think is so great
for which your fight
Why this fighting going on among all nonsensical people?
It's surprising how
People give up their peace,
Give-up they're understanding when it comes to a piece of land.
And the whole thing has moved into
A very wrong direction and going towards complete destruction
The thing that has made human beings so much suffering, because of all their ignorance
by which they have those habits –all these attractions- all this antiatrification
which is so ruinous, which will ruin all of them each one by one.
They have to take two cells and they
have to take, through their self-knowledge.
Self knowledge is the key for a savior –to give… to people!
We had so many saints we've got so many Sufis
…we had Tao People and Zen People all kinds of realized souls came on this earth
They all suffered, they were tortured – nobody understood them.
But now the time has come for you to know The Truth but truth which is not dry, truth
that has compassion and truth that encompasses everyone brings a complete view of our existence.
Why are we here on this earth?
What's your purpose?
What should we do?
Adi Shaktis powers are such of love and compassion that makes you understand yourself first.
The Love for You is very, very limited there's no awareness your own being here just imagine
What a great task is for you, how much you have to be seriously becoming aware of yourself
first.
That's extremely important!
First You've got to become aware and now the light in your spirit.
In that Light of Spirit we can see what We are.
And you can see how far your are going,
How wrong things we're doing.
What harm were do to yourself
and have a power cure it
To improve It
& come to your senses
These all the most important times
You'll never get these time again
Never had in the history
& will be never getting in future
This is the time you have got, not only awareness and self-knowledge but to know how do it.
Otherwise about saints or Tao and Zen people they just described what a person with Self-Knowledge
is, how he behaves ,how his style is and so different from others.
But none of them have said – How you become that?
No one has been able to say it!
Nobody had done this because perhaps most didn't know about Kundalini
And those who knew also could not talk about it to people.
So the greatest work of the Adi Shakti is,
To put this Kundalini in your sacrum bone
This kundalini
Is NOT the Adishakti
Adisakhthi
Kundalini is a much greater thing, much bigger thing, much wider thing.
Much deeper ,much stronger .Much more powerful .Kundalini
Is the reflection of Adi Shaktip power and when she rises you know what happens to
You
And how you get your realization but we have
be very watchful. Are you really a compassionate person? If you are compassionate, the first
thing that will happen to any compassionate person I think would been help others – to
emancipate other's! They cannot satisfied with their own achievements and state of
It cannot happen.
What was the need for Adi Shakti to do all these efforts?
To work so hard, you know that I had worked very-very hard but from my childhood I have
gone through very difficult times, very-very difficult times according to human understanding.
But the worst time I have when see those people whom I've given realization –
Those who are Self-realized People they're the ones
Who has no responsibility for others and if
love, it is very little. They don't have that compassion and they don' t have
the love we've got to today save this world – save humanity! That's not only our
principal work but also all other things are going achieve nothing except for your
efforts here, individual efforts to give self-realization
others and gave them this knowledge.
This knowledge is so easy
understand it's very subtle no doubt
And as I've told you that the quantum
theory they are talking about now the scientist
is that they have seen those miraculous waves of lights and
They are trying to find out something about it.
It cannot be,
That some Sahaja Yogis will rise above others
Every one has
To know
This a very special thing
Has happened
Even if you had gone to Himalayas
Even if you have starved yourself, even if
You've been singing the praise of God for years
–even though you had done all kinds
Of rituals and penances–you could not
Have got your realization. That would
Not happen possible! I knew this
And that's why
i have to work very hard
Facing many problems
All kinds of turmoils, all kind s pressures.
What was the thing?
Just to see that you are created and You're on My hands!
You have to work, every finger has to work and that is what I've been telling you.
That now it's our responsibility too see we become not only Sahaja Yogis ourselves
but blossoming time – many-many Sahajyogis should be there!
It' s a work of Adi Shakti.
Try to understand this, it's not work of any saint.
It is not a work for any incarnation
Is no the word of any politician
and not worked off in a big leader
because there was a father
which she so transparently showing its results in you
Now it is for you to see, to please Me – this your ardent desire I know.
I've seen how You love me and How want do for Me?
The greatest thing that can be done by Me Is spread Sahaja Yoga
It's a very special extremely difficult blessings you have got
You didn't have to do any efforts, you did not pay money and don´t get sick with rituals.
You got it spontaneously but that doesn' mean your birth right is the work of Adi Shakti
And the work of Adi Shakti has to be shown in your life,
is a compassion without any reward.
People have tried to spread their religion
by showing compassion towards poor people
looking after the poor and handicapped people
There's no need actually for Sahaja Yogis
What they have to do is transform other people, find out ways and methods how you can transform.
How? You spread the message of Adi Shakti. Put your mind into it
And we will know
how you can manage it.
There should be all the time a compaling desire
that we have to find out method
by which,we spread Sahaja Yoga
otherwise is like what Christ has described
That some seed fell on the marshy land
and they sprouted but never grew
You can only grow in the real sense of the word and become something very, very special
and real by knowing what you do.
I have a vision no doubt
And i've been talking about it quite alot
But It ends up with the puja is not good
I know some countries are very difficult, try to find out what is the problem.
Why?
It's so very different attention has been paid
To this that watch other human beings are going
to destroy themselves as if it was part and parcel of
same game which we call as The Last Judgment
But let us, through our compassion and love save as many as possible.
This is the work of Adi Shakti – not to any saint or incarnation they are all there
no doubt!
They're with All time helpers but you people have the power of Adishakti which
very great, which is very penetrating. Which is miraculous! It's so effective but unless
and until you become aware of your own powers how will work it out?
It would be like a dead machine that has everything
but nobody is there to work it out.
All the time I had
go through very, very hazardous times
and sometimes
felt that i may have take another birth
The way things were so difficult for me
But now
For you has been really easy
as if
one who makes a road
has to work very hard, but those who walk on that they don't realize how easily have
got it.
And if the realized this then there will be realized also he let many walk upon his
road which was created with such patience understanding and I had two really see you
All Sahaja Yogis, doing your level best to change this world has be changed.
As it is humanity have been saved through you and nobody else – no President or Prime
Minister nor Minister none of these people can save the world.
It is you who are entitled, you have got this power.
Do You realize your own status?
Your being which has risen so high – it's not there!
If that realization was there then would go all out to express love and compassion
to other people, to make them realized what they are.
Only with Sahaja Yoga you can save this world – there's no other way out!
Whatever we may try saying—to help the poor or to help these and that is something
very-very superficial — best thing it give realization
Every person you see – we have seen children, they are coming up.
There'll be great Sahaja Yogis also I can say that but before them
You've to show your own merits of what
It's not a static work it is big movement
which has really explosive and unless
until such a great step is taken, I don't know who will be blamed for the doomsday.
You are one that has to build up destiny of human beings – Don' t consider yourself
as something nothing!
You could never have got your Realization, you would never have come to Me.
Among so many – you are the ones who came me and asked for Realization and got it
…you know It cannot be forced!
This Realization can not be forced… this awareness can't be forced….
And growth of this awareness also can not be forced.
You have to develop that attention deep down within yourself and see for
your self what you've done. What do
if we are still busy with the money problem or
power problems, this problem
You are a problem, you're not a Sahaja Yogi.
Sahajyoga is above everything else and it's very powerful – power will be achieved
by them!
Power of love and compassion…
It isn't only words or love …it' s the act of loving others but
It is a powerful personality that you will have, which
just emit great divine light and can capture people.
All should take very brave personalities
I must say the people are improved
otherwise everybody used to write me
This is wrong with Me and that's wrong with My father, this' wrong with my great-grandmother
– all these.
That it over now much less I must say!
But instead of telling me about people who are sick ,people have failed or still in
a state that cannot be improved, attention should
changed. If there's one person who has got cancer anywhere
immediately at least ten photographs will come to Me
leader would write me the vice-leader will write
everybody writes to Me that mother is such and
why? Is it my job? That person can be cured
We have hospitals, can be cured by photographs but attention always goes now – the compassion
part of it.
To those people who are so-called suffering physically mentally emotionally financially
also in their marriages that's not your job neither mine if they're sick
They should take a photograph and work it out
If doesn't worked then means there is no need
for you to treat them and work it out, if they fail write me that Mother such-and-such
person is sick.
What's so important?
Already we have many healthy people going around – why not use the first thing!
Our job isn't just to cure people.
Affection or compassion are all right things but naturally our attention goes to sick
people or to the poor people, all through the people who are suffering.
But what about Sahaja Yoga?
If you have one sick person hundred Sahaj Yogis will get after that!
What is their reason ? Is it compassion?
It's not ! They want prove they can cure them . It's not compassion.
Compassion today is to transform human beings into sahajis,
Into good people. That's the love of Adi Shakti
because those who are born have died in any case
We should not be unkind
but our attention
Should how many we're giving realization
It a very common thing that
people indulge more into so-called curing and improving, it's all right.
Also there are problems like in marriages you see some married couple don't want
to be their not to, its alright finish them if they do'nt wanna live together let
them.
We have many people who are sensible in this world, many people who are healthy in the
world – how can you go on struggling with people don't want to live together and
having problems?
That's not your job!
First of all You're a spiritual worker we arenot social workers.
Of course by-the way you do social work it doesn' matter but main thing for
With that the greatest disease is of meanness,
cruelty and torturing others.
All these diseases can be cured which are internal not external
That's what today wanted
Every country fighting and is
tortured
all time getting destroyed
The only way you can do it is to give them Realization.
Now what happens, needs be seen very clearly
that when
You Give Realization To Someone
and He values It
And he grows into IT
then
we are protected
We're completely protected
Who protects you?
You may say
the Adi Shakti all right
but also
There is a destructive power working in this world, not of negativity but positive destructive
Power of Shiva.
If he says that if Adi Shakti's work going on well – He'll be happy!
But His sitting there and watching each every person…each
in every work of Sahaja Yogis, and if he finds something really very wrong I cannot control
it.
He destroys –I can not go up to that point-he destroys…not only destroys thousands
you destroy anywhere there is a calamity we say like an earthquake or some sort
a hurricane, all these things come through the working of Shri Mahadeva.
I can't help you there but if You really give realization to Me – All this
Can be averted!
Of course it is the vim ,I should say, of Hari Shakti that She started This work
of creating this world, of creating you and making you Sahaja Yogis.
But your responsibility is also very important
– You cannot be responsible!
Maybe it was I felt my responsibility
but there's a difference
…I never felt It as My Responsibility
Never Felt This Was My Job
never felt I have to do it, I did It.
That's the work!
that is kind of personality you should
You have
To Do
In a very humble manner
in A very beautiful manner
and you'll be amazed
See how you are protected
How your supported
And how everything works out
The greatest joy
will get, when you'll find. You can give Realization to people and change their lives
– never would feel such joy even if gets a big lottery maybe or job or name for very
The joy of creating Sahaja Yogis knows no bounds, is such a joy-giving thing.
You develop such fraternity – such solidarity as they call it…
Such oneness!
Such enjoyment of love, enjoyment of compassion is a different level
That's not like ordinary enjoyments.
You are to be afraid me but be afraid yourself
Have watch on your self and see for youself
What have been doing so far?
What have you done so far, because You've been enlightened.
If the enlightened people cannot give light what's use of having them?
Look at these little candles whatever little
lights they are giving that Light
They're burning themselves to get that Light
if we can not give that Light
What is the use of enlightenment?
Enlightened doesn't mean, the light for yourself only.
The Light Of Love, Compassion which
Which Is Divine, not normal
Not ordinary
As you see in the films
It's a divine love
That works
And that what makes me sometimes
Little weak when I hear
That Sahaja Yogis now are getting involved in money, in cheating – I mean all kinds
of criminal activities they do.
…I can't understand…
After getting the highest why you want to go so low as that?
Because we have not yet felt what We've got!
You have not realized what you've got and don't respect yourself.
Still if are on the same line, at a level I must say that
no justice has been done to me or your self
We need work it out. Single handed I did it
Worked very hard in the sense
that I had to deal with horrible people, very unkind ,very selfish and cruel but it doesn't
matter.
And such beautiful words have been discovered . But you must keep your luster
work it out. I'll be very happy to know that Sahaja Yoga is spreading with leaps and bounds,
great speed – people are really getting into the realm of peace joy happiness
That's my dream and I hope you all will work it out.
Sarvam Jagajidam Tattvo Jayate
Sarvam Jagajidam Tatvasthishtati
Sarvum Jagajidam Twai Lameshchati
Sarvom Jagajidam Twoi Pratyetih
Tuam Bhumi Rapo Nalo Neelo
Namaham Jatvari Vapradani
Tvam gunatrayati taha
Tvam dehatrayati taha
Tvam kalatrayati taha
Tvam muladhara sityosinitya
Tvam shaktitrayatmakah
Tvam yogino dhyayanti nitya
Vaisakha raha purva roopam dhyama roopam
Anusvara ishthanta roopm
Bindura ruddharoopm
Madhasandhanam sahitasandi
Saisha Ganesa vidya ganaka rishi
Nishrityayatri chanda gana padeer devatah
Raktavasasam, rakta gandhanu liptangham, raktapuspayeshu pujitam, bhaktanukampinandevam
jagat karna acyutamm avirbhūtam ca śruṣṭi ādau prapuraḥ krihe purushāt pararam
evam dhyāyatyo nityaṁ sa yogi, yoginām varhā
namorāta-pata ye, namogana-pa taya
namaste astu lambodharāya
ekadantāya vignanāshine shivasutāya
Shri Varadha Murtayanam Akshashrim Adishakti Mataji Shrinivasa
